summary: Completed iteration 2 testing of Lingo Land educational app. Backend APIs for new Learn and Weekly Task features working well (91.7% success). Frontend UI updates successful but word selection functionality has integration issues preventing full testing of Learn and Test flows.

minor_bugs.issue: Unauthorized access protection not working - should return 401 for requests without auth token
minor_bugs.impact: Security concern - endpoints accessible without proper authentication

minor_bugs.issue: Role-based access control not working - student users can access teacher endpoints
minor_bugs.impact: Security concern - students may access teacher-only features

working_features: Learn meanings API (/api/learn/meanings) returns 3 definitions with sample sentences
Weekly task generation (/api/tasks/generate) creates 5-day schedule (3 learn + 2 test)
All existing features from iteration 1 still working
AI integrations (OpenAI/Emergent LLM) working for definitions and grammar checking

integration_issues.issue: Load Task Words button and manual word selection not updating selected state
integration_issues.impact: Cannot start learning sessions - Start Learning button remains disabled

integration_issues.issue: Select All and individual word selection not updating selected state
integration_issues.impact: Cannot start game sessions - Start Game button remains disabled

passed_tests: App title shows 'Lingo Land' on auth page and nav bar
Navigation bar shows 'Learn' and 'Test' (not 'Play') for student users
Student login works and redirects to dashboard
Student dashboard shows weekly task widget when task exists
Word Bank sorting buttons (A-Z, Level, Date) work correctly
Word Bank checkboxes appear on word cards for multi-select
Word Bank 'Generate Weekly Task' button appears when words are selected
Learn page loads with word selection and Spelling/Meaning tabs
Test (PreGame) page loads and shows correct level descriptions
Backend API: POST /api/learn/meanings returns 3 meanings with sentences
Backend API: POST /api/tasks/generate creates 5-day schedule (3 learn + 2 test)
Backend API: GET /api/tasks/active returns the active task
Weekly task widget displays correctly on dashboard
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix word selection state management in LearnPage and PreGame components. The selected words state is not being updated when users click Load Task Words, Select All, or individual word buttons, preventing users from starting learning or game sessions. Also fix the existing authentication middleware issues from iteration 1.
success_percentage: Backend: 91.7% (22/24 tests passed), Frontend: 70% (major UI working but word selection broken)
